title: The companies making billions from the Iran war
snippet: Through surging profits or soaring share prices, the war has been a boon for some firms.

title: Ethiopian woman's joy at rare quintuplets after 12 years trying for a baby
snippet: The woman, 35, says she was praying for a baby and was "overjoyed" to be "blessed with five at once".

title: The UK is set for a staycation summer - and there are plenty of hidden gems
snippet: Seasoned staycationers share their favourite spots as Airbnb and Booking.com say interest in UK stays are up on last year.

title: Countries airlift nationals evacuated from virus-hit cruise ship
snippet: Spanish passengers are the first to leave the MV Hondius, after an outbreak saw three people die and several infected.

title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes killed 39
snippet: Israel and Hezbollah have continued to trade fire despite a ceasefire deal being announced last month.

title: Army parachutes onto remote island to help Briton with suspected hantavirus
snippet: The specialist team parachuted onto Tristan da Cunha, a remote British overseas territory, to treat them.

title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship on way to Canary Islands after three evacuated
snippet: A British man is among three evacuees sent to the Netherlands after displaying symptoms while aboard the MV Hondius.

title: Watch: Drone delivers first Amazon parcels in UK
snippet: The tech giant says it hopes to slowly expand the service as the demand for ultra-fast deliveries grows.

title: Iran sends response to US proposals to end war
snippet: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.

title: Is this the real face of Anne Boleyn?
snippet: A computer science team believes they have discovered a previously unknown sketch of King Henry VIII's second wife - but not everyone is convinced.

title: What is hantavirus and how does it spread?
snippet: The Andes strain of the virus, which can rarely be passed from person to person,  has been found among passengers of a cruise ship.

title: Global forest loss slows but El Niño fires could threaten progress
snippet: The loss of tropical rainforests eased last year, according to new analysis, but scientists warn they are still disappearing rapidly.

title: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
snippet: New research suggests glacier melt driven by climate change is increasing the risk of giant waves.

title: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
snippet: Meta said Ofcom's calculations were "disproportionate"; the regulator said it would defend its position.

title: Putin says he thinks Ukraine conflict 'coming to an end'
snippet: The Russian leader sees potential for Ukraine negotiations, but condemns the West's backing for President Zelensky.
